hypotheses.name: 3-phase sprint works across project types
hypotheses.evidence: UX/accessibility sprint completed in 3-phase workflow. Think (consensus) → Execute (4 waves with parallel agents) → Ship. Gates passed first try. Different project type (UI/UX) vs Sprint 1 (security audit).

hypotheses.name: Gates catch real issues
hypotheses.evidence: E2E tests caught coach marks overlay blocking all room interactions (61 failures). Fixed with custom Playwright fixtures. svelte-check caught orphaned CSS selector (.theme-toggle-btn). Unit tests verified ARIA attributes.

hypotheses.name: Skills are followed by agents
hypotheses.evidence: See retrospective for 5-instruction audit. All 5 compliant: TDD (tests written per module), no plaintext, model matching (haiku for mechanical, sonnet for logic), keyboard navigation (focus-visible), no GitHub milestone (N/A for UX sprint).
